text:
Subject: Fw: ports/4878: Apache w/FrontPage Module Port
   Date: Thu, 15 Jan 1998 09:47:22 -0600
   From: "Scot W. Hetzel" <hetzels@westbend.net>
     To: <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.ORG>


I have updated the Apace w/FrontPage Module port to use apache-1.2.5.

The port is located at:
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/apache-fp.port.tgz


The Patch is located at: 
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/apache-fp_125.diff


Scot W. Hetzel
